name: Round Trip
short_description: Round Trip is a marble game full of challenging levels with different mechanics in each map, will you be able to overcome the challenge?
detailed_description:
Round Trip is a platform video game where you will take control of a billiard ball where you will have to be very precise to avoid falling and also maintain your balance to complete the different challenges that are in the game.

Features


  • Each map has a different mechanic.
  • Unlocked FPS.
  • DLSS upscaling.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal
